title: INFOPACKAGE ON GOOD PRACTICES AND EVALUATION CRITERIA FOR CITIZEN-DRIVEN FOOD SYSTEM GOVERNANCE
description: A step-by-step guide for practitioners offering recommendations, templates, and exercises to develop and implement civic-driven food system governance strategies. It outlines five phases—initiation, assessment, stakeholder engagement, vision building and action planning, and evaluation—and provides good practices and evaluation criteria for citizen-driven food governance.
